caption: A dark gray background with a subtle network of white lines and dots serves as the backdrop for an animated sequence. A gold logo consisting of a stylized coin stack and a lightning bolt appears, accompanied by the gold text "COINTELEGRAPH" and the tagline "The Future of Money". As the sequence progresses, a gold thumbs-up icon emerges with the word "like" written in white below it. A small gold YouTube play button icon also appears briefly. In the final stages, the screen populates with a row of three gold icons: the thumbs-up, a larger YouTube play button, and a Bitcoin symbol. Below these icons, the white text "like", "subscribe", and "hodl" appear respectively. The logos and text remain consistent in style and color throughout the animation, moving from a simple logo reveal to a full set of call-to-action buttons.
